name: Command Processor AutoRun
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: AutoRun value executes a command every time cmd.exe starts — a persistence and tampering mechanism.
forensic_value: A non-empty AutoRun value under Command Processor executes before every cmd.exe session — persistence without modifying Run keys. Also used to trojan cmd.exe behavior (e.g., run a keylogger on every shell invocation). Compare HKCU vs HKLM versions.
